name: 21-Day Interest-Free Grace Period

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who receive a notice and demand for payment from the IRS.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Eliminates interest charges for the period following a notice and demand if the full amount is paid within 21 calendar days (or 10 business days if the amount is $100,000 or more).
